## Checklist

- [ ] **Linked issue**: This PR references an existing issue
- [ ] **Scope documented**: Changes are clearly described above
- [ ] **Tests pass**: `go test ./...` passes locally
- [ ] **Build succeeds**: `go build ./...` completes without errors
- [ ] **No regressions**: Existing functionality still works as expected
- [ ] **Documentation updated**: README or docs updated if user-facing changes
- [ ] **Commits are atomic**: Each commit represents one logical change

### Plan Safekeeping
